title: orchis × erdingeri
intro: Orchis × erdingeri, also known as the hybrid bee orchid or Erdinger's bee orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys sphegodes. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat skin infections and wounds. The health benefits of Orchis × erdingeri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, although its availability is limited due to its rarity and protected status.
